articles.headline: Towards Environmentally Sustainable Aviation: A Review on Operational Optimization

articles.takeaway: Operational optimization through advanced technologies across airlines, airports, and flight operations is essential to meet growing demand while reducing environmental impact.
keywords: aviation; optimization; operations research; sustainability; environmental impacts
